---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability, skill, or registry improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear description of what you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Include YAML examples if proposing a new capability or skill.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.
